zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Hartshorn於1678年1月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可雷亞丁時，她的父親Joseph Hartshorn25歲，母親Sarah Burt22歲。她於1700年1月8日與Samuel Guild在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她於1678年住在美國麻薩諸塞州且於1678年住在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可衛克菲德。她去世於1750年8月8日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆文達哈姆文達哈姆 特享年72歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州托藍德哥倫比亞笛卡爾 亞德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hartshorn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hartshorne (Derbyshire), from Old English heort ‘hart, stag’ (genitive heortes) + horn ‘horn’, perhaps in reference to the nearby hill (known as Hart Hill) and its supposed resemblance to a hart's horn. Alternatively, the name may be topographic, from Middle English harteshorn ‘swine cress’, for someone who lived at or near an area where swine cress grew.

variants.name: Hartshorne
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Shropshire): variant of   Hartshorn  .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.description: Windham County was created from Hartford and New London counties on May 12, 1726

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Hartshorn was born on 5 January 1678, in Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Joseph Hartshorn, was 25 and her mother, Sarah Burt, was 22. She married Samuel Guild on 8 January 1700, in Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She lived in Massachusetts, United States in 1678 and Wakefield, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States in 1678. She died on 8 August 1750, in Windham Center, Windham, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Connecticut, United States.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Hartshorn(이)가 1678년 1월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리딩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joseph Hartshorn(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Burt(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1700년 1월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크에서 Samuel Guild(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1678년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주에서, 1678년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 웨이크필드에서 살았다. 그녀는 1750년 8월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 윈드함 윈드함 세터에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 콜럼비아 드 야어드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Hartshorn nasceu em 5 de janeiro de 1678, em Reading, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Joseph Hartshorn, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Burt, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Guild em 8 de janeiro de 1700, em Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela viveu em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1678 e em Wakefield, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1678. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1750, em Windham Center, Windham, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Yard Cemetery, Columbia, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Hartshorn родилась 5 января 1678 г. в местности ридинг, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Joseph Hartshorn было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Burt, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Guild 8 января 1700 г. в местности норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она жила в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1678 году и в местности веикефиелд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1678 году. Она умерла 8 августа 1750 г. в местности виндхам кентир, виндхам, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности олд ярд кеметири, колумбя, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.
